projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: v1.3.1 shipped — ML foot segmentation + inch read-outs. Measurement is being rebuilt around the paper-as-reference method (paper for scale + perspective, heel-against-wall datum) to fix the over-long length.
projects.nextStep: Claude is rebuilding the measurement pipeline.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Vision draft done. Phase 1 — the daily transit loop — built and shipped, plus the channel-rendering fix, channel-description reorder, expandable Strategy/Not-Self guidance, and the dating on/off toggle.
projects.nextStep: Pick the next move: the social layer, daily-loop notifications, or the swiping go-live work.

projects.name: Futon
projects.note: N4-N1 grammar (653 points) + vocab (6,995 words) shipped and applied to the database. Home page updated to add the Achievements, Social and Recent Activity sections.
projects.nextStep: Greenlight the home-page update — it's staged, awaiting your go to commit.

projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: v1.11.2 (free tier + UX polish) merged and pushed; ci_post_clone.sh added so Xcode Cloud builds cleanly.
projects.nextStep: Xcode Cloud is building v1.11.2 to TestFlight — submit for App Store review when you're ready.

projects.name: WEATHER
projects.note: Breath-orb layout fix shipped (the dot that pushed buttons past the fold). iOS + Android App Store prep ongoing.
projects.nextStep: Claude is prepping the App Store build — nothing needed from you yet.

projects.name: POSTURE

projects.nextStep: Revived and current; further work on request.
